prompt: Add a dark mode toggle to my website. It should remember the user's preference.
expectations: Gathers project context silently first (reads CLAUDE.md, package.json, etc.)
Asks clarifying questions about the existing tech stack and design system
Writes a spec to specs/dark-mode.md or similar descriptive filename
Spec addresses persistence mechanism (localStorage, cookie, or system preference)
Includes an explicit approval gate - waits for user sign-off before coding
